topic: C0b 4-verb numerical MVP simulators all PASS (4/4) → v1.1.0 candidate. Tetrahedron numerical companion to spec is now wired across composition / actuation / catalysis / assembly axes.
verdict_detail: All four verbs (WEAVE / NANOBOT / RIBOZYME / VIROCAPSID) ship Python stdlib-only numerical MVP simulators that internally PASS their respective n=6 invariant + per-verb physics-constraint tests. Each emits witness rows to state/discovery_absorption/registry.jsonl under its raw_77 schema. HEXA dispatcher pattern (verb/module/verb.hexa) consistent across all 4 with HEXA_BIO_WITH_NUMPY=1 opt-in gate. Total ~3500 LOC new across 4 Python bridges + 4 HEXA module extensions + 4 test files. v1.1.0 release candidate.
verdict_terminal_caveat: v1.1.0 is FORMALISM/INFRASTRUCTURE closure — internal consistency demonstrations, not real-world therapeutic efficacy. 16-cell matrix (4 verb × 4 disease class, terminal goal per .roadmap.hexa_bio §0) remains 0/16 cells filled. C2 in-silico per-cell candidate design NOT STARTED. C3+ (wet-lab, IND, phase I) explicitly out-of-repo. v1.1.0 ≠ medical progress.
